content.full_text:
COMMITTEE TO ELECT MANUEL G. NUNEZ
4983 E. Grant
Fresno, California 93727
I.D. #901015

August 4, 1990


Fair Political Practices Commission
Attn: Joe Garcia
428 "J" Street
Sacramento, Calif. 95814

Dear Mr. Garcia,

Thank you for taking the time to discuss my concerns about an impending court case against my election. As per your suggestion I am asking for written advise on this issue. As I explained to you, I was elected on June 5, 1990 to the position of Fresno Unified School Board Trustee. Two candidates listed for the voters were not eligible for the position. One candidate voluntarily pulled out of the race, and another was found to be in the wrong area for this post. A losing candidate in my area is now contesting the election.

My question was, can campaign funds be used for legal defense purposes in the above situation, when a election is contested?

Please send your written ruling as soon as possible.

Thank you.

Manuel G. Nunez
F.U.S.D. Trustee

MGN/pah
